Welcome To The

Ultimate Game Stash

─────────────

Instructions:
Head over to the pages on the right and download the file, open it, and the game will run in your downloads

─────────────

DISCLAIMER:

All these games’ rights go to their respective owners I do not claim to own any of these games

~

THIS IS A COMPLETELY FREE DOC IF YOU PAID MONEY FOR THIS YOU HAVE BEEN SCAMMED AND DEMAND A REFUND
~
All these files can be used in your own website (Credit would be nice tho)

─────────────
Blocked?
Head over to the Methods page and try some of those ways


If the games still do not work message me in

The Ultimate Game Stash Discord Server

IMPORTANT LINKS

Discord: https://discord.gg/rmVsAqkpkA 

Documentation: https://sites.google.com/view/ugs-docs/ 

Google Drive Folder: UGS Files 

Game site: https://sites.google.com/view/plet/home   (not updating)

Game Request: https://forms.gle/KhMJYV3pMUz3fkyg9 (I don't look at this much so I recommend suggesting in the discord)
Business Email: clotsine@gmail.com 

Contact: https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLScThtyrgEz35PGVeCV3rWRURFeboQ1MTkFsnIe-sydt5_g95g/viewform

METHODS

If file:/// links are blocked:
Go to the game you want and copy the code and paste it into a code previewer (like W3schools, Code Beautify etc.) or Google Sites 

────────────

If jsdelivr is blocked; and/or all code editors are blocked:

  1. 1. Go to code.org  and create a new web lab project
  2. Paste this code into the editor and click the button (this for offline) drag files directly onto the text
    3. (only required for offline) Get a game from Offline Files and directly drag it onto the editor.
    ─────────────
    If files outside your organization are blocked:
    Download the Google Drive Folder  and put that on a USB drive
    or
    Send the files to yourself through gmail from your a home computer
    or
    Use the dropbox links in     Important Links (they're most likely suspended)
    or
    type in the code yourself onto a html code runner.
    ─────────────
    If none of these work contact me in The Ultimate Game Stash Discord Server

Offline Files

Offline Files

For running outside of file:// use this

──────────────────────────

Community Made Singlefiles

Community singlefiles
────────────────────────

Note: these are files made by community members and are not affiliated with UGS in any way, shape or form.
Send submissions to @shxyder, @dudeluther1232, or @pokemonhacker1337 on discord. Note: NSFW and paid indie games are not permitted.

EMULATED GAMES

Emulated Games
IMPORTANT NOTE: To save your progress on the emulated games hover over the game screen and click the disk icon or the Save State button before you close the game. When you reopen the game click the folder icon or the Load State button and open the saved state that you downloaded earlier.

Additionally, some games may run poorly, especially on 3D based systems such as the Playstation, N64 and DS. It is recommended to turn off VSync to assist with performance.
─────────────
EMULATOR: clemujs.html
